info.title: Prontiq API
info.description: Unified API for Australian and global open data products.

ClerkJwt.description: Clerk session token. Frontend obtains via `getToken()` then sends as `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`.

schema.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return.

parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return.
parameters.name: limit

state.description: Australian state code (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT).

reliability.description: G-NAF geocode reliability (0-6, lower is better).

category.description: Land use category, e.g. Residential, Commercial.

match.description: Best matching address, or null if no match.

confidence.description: Match confidence: high (score > 20), medium (10-20), low (< 10), or none (no match).

state.description: Australian state code (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT).

reliability.description: G-NAF geocode reliability (0-6, lower is better).

category.description: Land use category, e.g. Residential, Commercial.

schema.description: Maximum number of nearby addresses to return.

parameters.description: Maximum number of nearby addresses to return.
parameters.name: limit

state.description: Australian state code (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT).

reliability.description: G-NAF geocode reliability (0-6, lower is better).

category.description: Land use category, e.g. Residential, Commercial.

distance_m.description: Distance from query point in meters.

schema.description: Maximum number of localities to return.

parameters.description: Maximum number of localities to return.
parameters.name: limit

address_count.description: Number of addresses in this locality.

schema.description: Maximum number of postcodes to return.

parameters.description: Maximum number of postcodes to return.
parameters.name: limit

bounds.description: Geographic bounding box of the suburb.

post.summary: Recover or initialise an org envelope (Clerk JWT auth)
post.description: Idempotent. Resolves the caller's verified primary email via the Clerk Backend API and provisions the org's Stripe customer + envelope + audit row. Mirrors the Clerk webhook's provisioning path so a delayed/missed webhook is recoverable from the dashboard.

emailSent.description: True only when the welcome email was best-effort sent for a freshly-created envelope. Absent on already_exists replays.
True only when the welcome email was best-effort sent for a freshly-created envelope. Absent on already_exists replays.

get.description: Returns Prontiq-owned billing state for the caller's active Clerk organization. Lago remains off the API hot path; this admin/account route may read Lago-backed billing state.

403.description: Caller is not an org admin

post.description: Admin-only and idempotent via Idempotency-Key. P1B.18 supports Free and PAYG self-service targets only.

schema.description: Required idempotency key for replay-safe billing mutations.

parameters.description: Required idempotency key for replay-safe billing mutations.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

200.description: Plan change accepted, scheduled, or a no-op

403.description: Plan changes disabled or caller unauthorized

post.summary: Create a Lago customer portal session
post.description: Returns a Lago portal URL for invoice history, billing details, and payment-management surfaces.

schema.description: Required idempotency key for replay-safe billing mutations.

parameters.description: Required idempotency key for replay-safe billing mutations.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

403.description: Caller is not an org admin
